ads.headline: Get Analysis Before the Headlines
ads.body: Join our Telegram channel for real-time dispatches, breaking analysis, and discussions that don't fit a news cycle.
ads.label: Our Channel

ads.headline: The Revolutionary Dispatch
ads.body: Subscriber-exclusive essays, reading lists, and theory — straight to your inbox, weekly.
ads.label: Newsletter

ads.headline: Watch the Video Essays
ads.body: Lectures on political economy, revolutionary history, and Ethiopian politics — in video form.
ads.label: Video

ads.headline: Also in Addis Standard
ads.body: Our editor's column appears regularly in Ethiopia's leading English-language publication.
ads.label: Column

ads.headline: Write for Abyot
ads.body: We publish original analysis from organizers, scholars, and working people. Send your pitch.
ads.label: Contribute
